data.body: DONE (commit b10a0b16). 13 in-process tests covering the 3 review-flagged gaps (no dual-run — bash is gone): signature close-gate over story+epic (gate off/on, stale-HEAD 'different commit', --force-close warning bytes + FORCE_CLOSE audit comment); transition exit-10 (CLI exit 10 + library ConcurrencyError, store unchanged); compact-all --limit + compact lock-timeout/git-failure error paths (monkeypatched seams, no-corruption assertions). Full suite 1675 passed; ruff+format green. Tests directly inspected for genuineness (real path-exercising assertions, not change-detectors).
